# Kabuki94/MiOS-bootstrap

> Build-infrastructure repo for MiOS, an immutable bootc-native workstation OS.
> Snapshot v0.1.5. Single source of truth: INDEX.md.
> Deployed root overlay: https://github.com/Kabuki94/MiOS

MiOS is a self-building, immutable workstation OS on Fedora bootc with the
Universal Blue ucore-hci base. The deployed system is OpenAI-API native: any
client speaking the OpenAI REST protocol targets a MiOS host at
http://localhost:8080/v1, served by LocalAI (FOSS) with on-disk discovery
under /v1/ and stateful model storage at /srv/ai/.

## Architecture

- INDEX.md - Single source of truth for build-time architecture and conventions
- AGENTS.md - In-image agent contract (lives in MiOS, not bootstrap)
- VERSION  - Canonical release tag

## Repository layout

- automation/ - Build orchestration (master runner + numbered phase scripts)
- tools/ - Build helpers, push scripts, init utilities
- usr/, etc/, home/ - System file overlays consumed by the Containerfile
- config/ - bootc-image-builder configs, ignition definitions
- specs/ - Architectural research and engineering docs

## OpenAI-API client integration (FOSS only)

Any FOSS implementation of the OpenAI REST protocol works against MiOS
without code changes:

- LocalAI       - reference backend, ships in the deployed image as a Quadlet
- Ollama        - drop-in via the same /v1 endpoint
- vLLM          - high-throughput backend for larger models
- llama.cpp     - direct GGUF execution
- MCP servers   - registered under /v1/mcp, discoverable via filesystem or HTTP

No vendor-specific SDK, IDE plugin, agent framework, or cloud provider is
required or assumed.

## Standards alignment

- OpenAI REST API (open spec, multi-vendor implementations)
- Model Context Protocol (MCP, open spec)
- Linux Filesystem Hierarchy Standard (FHS 3.0)
- XDG Base Directory specification
- systemd unit + Quadlet conventions
- bootc / OCI image format
- SLSA / Sigstore (cosign keyless signing)

## License

Apache-2.0. Source: https://github.com/Kabuki94/MiOS-bootstrap
Deployments: ghcr.io/kabuki94/mios:latest
